sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ELEONORE de Savoie ([1279]-1324).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ELEONORE de Savoie, widow of GUILLAUME Comte d'Auxerre, daughter of AMEDEE V Comte de Savoie & his first wife Sibylle de Bâgé ([1279]-1324).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eléonore de SAVOIE於大約1273年出生在義大利托斯卡納費倫費倫時，她的父親Amédée de SAVOIE IV25歲，母親Sybille Simone de BAUGE19歲。她於1292年1月12日與Guillaume de CHALON在法國布格-福朗-可特艾奧結婚。她去世於1327年1月7日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯o維爾福朗-素-薩o享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SAVOIE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Eléonore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eléonore de SAVOIE was born about 1273, in Florence, Florence, Tuscany, Italy, her father, Amédée de SAVOIE IV, was 25 and her mother, Sybille Simone de BAUGE, was 19. She married Guillaume de CHALON on 12 January 1292, in Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. She died on 7 January 1327, in Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eléonore de SAVOIE est née environ 1273, à Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italie, son père, Amédée de SAVOIE IV, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Sybille Simone de BAUGE, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de CHALON le 12 janvier 1292, à Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1327, à Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eléonore de SAVOIE um 1273 in Florenz, Firenze, Toscana, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Amédée de SAVOIE IV 25 und ihre Mutter Sybille Simone de BAUGE 19. Sie hat am 12. Januar 1292 in Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Guillaume de CHALON geheiratet. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1327 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

Lei sposato Guillaume de CHALON il 12 gennaio 1292, nel Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. ja.lifeSummary: Eléonore de SAVOIEが約1273年にイタリアトスカナフィアーエンズフィアーエンズで生まれた時，父Amédée de SAVOIE IVは25歳，母Sybille Simone de BAUGEは19歳であった。1292年1月12日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンアウクセアでGuillaume de CHALONと結婚した。彼女は1327年1月7日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスルhoンヴィレフランチェ-スル-サoンで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eléonore de SAVOIE(이)가 대략 1273년 이탈리아 토스캔아 피렌즈 피렌즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Amédée de SAVOIE IV(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybille Simone de BAUGE(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1292년 1월 12일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 오세르에서 Guillaume de CHALON(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1327년 1월 7일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 ho니 비레프랭체-수-사o니에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eléonore de SAVOIE nasceu aproximadamente 1273, em Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Itália, seu pai, Amédée de SAVOIE IV, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Sybille Simone de BAUGE, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de CHALON em 12 de janeiro de 1292, em Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1327, em Villefranche-sur-Saône, Rhône, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eléonore de SAVOIE родилась около 1273 г. в местности фиренз, фиренз, тоскана, Италия, её отцу по имени Amédée de SAVOIE IV было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybille Simone de BAUGE, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de CHALON 12 января 1292 г. в местности ауксирр, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. Она умерла 7 января 1327 г. в местности виллефрэнче-сур-саoн, рoн, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Guillaume de CHALON el 12 de enero de 1292, en Auxerre, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
